g.text: Three levers can unlock $4.2M in annual savings
Key performance indicators trending above target
APAC revenue grew 18% YoY, outpacing all other regions
Key drivers: pricing optimization, new market entry, product mix. Source:
Impact-effort matrix reveals three quick wins
HIGH IMPACT / LOW EFFORT: Quick wins
HIGH IMPACT / HIGH EFFORT: Major projects
Option B delivers higher NPV with moderate execution risk
Option A: Conservative. NPV $12M. Low risk. 18-month timeline.
Option B: Balanced. NPV $22M. Moderate risk. 24-month timeline.
Option C: Aggressive. NPV $31M. High risk. 36-month timeline.
Benchmarking reveals performance gaps in three areas
Source: Process mapping and FTE analysis, September 2026
Transformation roadmap spans three waves over 18 months
Governance: Monthly SteerCo, weekly workstream leads, quarterly board update
Three decisions required from leadership this month
1. Approve Wave 1 budget ($1.2M) 2. Assign executive sponsor for
transformation program 3. Schedule diagnostic kickoff for October 7
